titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 587

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=21 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:19:35.851706+00 | translation moa=22 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:19:35.860591+00

p.cl:
W. Rex Scottorum . Iusticiis Vicecomitibus . et Omnibus probis hominibus tocius terre sue
salutem .

Mando et firmiter precipio ut ubicumque extra mea dominia prior de
Coldincham aut seruientes sui inuenerint fugitiuos et natiuos homines
de terris suis de Coldincham et Coldinchameschire  eos iuste habeant . et prohibeo
firmiter ne quis eis quemquam ex hominibus illis iniuste detineat super
meum forisfactum .
Testibus . Ricardo Cumin . Roberto de Costentin . Iohanne de Vallibus . hugone clerico . Ricardo clerico .
William, king of the Scots, to the justices, sheriffs, and all worthy men of his entire land greeting.

I command and resolutely instruct that wherever outside my demesne the prior of Coldingham or his tenants may have found fugitives and neyfs from their lands of Coldingham and Coldinghamshire, they may lawfully have them. And I strictly forbid that anyone unlawfully withhold from them a single one of those men upon pain of my forfeiture.
As witnesses: Richard Comyn; Robert de Côtentin; John de Vaux; Hugh the clerk; Richard the clerk.
